data.name: Header_Title
data.value: Sign in with your passkey

data.name: Header_Subtitle
data.value: Use your fingerprint, face, or device PIN. Your passkey produces the encryption keys for this app — they never leave your device.

data.name: Status_CheckingPrf
data.value: Checking passkey support…

data.name: Alert_PrfNotSupported
data.value: Passkeys with PRF aren't supported on this browser or device. Try a recent Chrome / Edge / Safari, or a device with a platform authenticator.

data.name: Alert_DiscoverableCancelled
data.value: No passkey selected. Register a new passkey to get started, or try again to pick an existing one.

data.name: Register_Header
data.value: Register a new passkey

data.name: Register_Description
data.value: Add a passkey to this device. Optional display name shows in the platform credential UI and as a label on your public key.

data.name: Field_DisplayNameLabel
data.value: Display name (optional)

data.name: Field_DisplayNameHelper
data.value: Shown in your password manager and credential picker.

data.name: Btn_Authenticate
data.value: Authenticate

data.name: Btn_Register
data.value: Register passkey

data.name: Btn_TryAgain
data.value: Try again

data.name: Caption_UsingHint
data.value: Using your most recent passkey — the platform skips the picker.

data.name: Caption_DiscoverablePicker
data.value: Pick a passkey from the platform list.

data.name: Status_Registered
data.value: Passkey registered. You're signed in.

data.name: Status_AuthenticationCancelled
data.value: Authentication cancelled.

data.name: Status_DiscoverableCancelled
data.value: No passkey selected.

data.name: Status_RegisterCancelled
data.value: Registration cancelled.

data.name: Status_WrongPasskeyForDisk
data.value: Wrong passkey — this passkey doesn't unlock the encrypted database. Use the original passkey, or reset the database.

data.name: Alert_WrongPasskeyForDisk
data.value: This passkey doesn't unlock the current database. You're not signed in — but the passkey's public key is shown below so you can hand it to a peer who will encrypt an export to it.

data.name: Btn_DismissWrongPasskey
data.value: Dismiss

data.name: Error_Authenticate_REGISTRATION_FAILED
data.value: Authentication failed: registration data invalid. Try registering a new passkey.

data.name: Error_Authenticate_KEY_DERIVATION_FAILED
data.value: Couldn't derive keys from this passkey. Try registering a new one.

data.name: Error_Authenticate_AUTHENTICATION_TAG_MISMATCH
data.value: Wrong passkey for this app. Pick a different one or register a new passkey.

data.name: Error_Authenticate_CREDENTIAL_NOT_FOUND
data.value: That passkey isn't on this device. Register a new one or try Authenticate to pick from the available list.

data.name: Error_Authenticate_INVALID_DATA
data.value: The passkey returned unexpected data. Try again, or register a new passkey.

data.name: Error_Authenticate_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: This passkey doesn't support PRF. Register a new one with a platform authenticator that supports PRF.

data.name: Error_Authenticate_PRF_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: This browser or device doesn't support PRF.

data.name: Error_Authenticate_Unknown
data.value: Authentication failed: {0}

data.name: Error_Register_REGISTRATION_FAILED
data.value: Couldn't register the passkey. Try again or pick a different authenticator.

data.name: Error_Register_KEY_DERIVATION_FAILED
data.value: The new passkey didn't produce derivable keys.

data.name: Error_Register_AUTHENTICATION_TAG_MISMATCH
data.value: Authentication tag mismatch during register-then-derive. Try again.

data.name: Error_Register_CREDENTIAL_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The freshly-created credential disappeared. Try again.

data.name: Error_Register_INVALID_DATA
data.value: The new passkey returned unexpected data.

data.name: Error_Register_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: The selected authenticator doesn't support PRF.

data.name: Error_Register_PRF_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: This browser or device doesn't support PRF.

data.name: Error_Register_Unknown
data.value: Registration failed: {0}
